allow: Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\('./package.json'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\({gsap: pkg.dependencies.gsap, lenis: pkg.dependencies.lenis, framer: pkg.dependencies['framer-motion']}, null, 2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\('./package.json'\); const deps = {...pkg.dependencies, ...pkg.devDependencies}; console.log\(Object.entries\(deps\).filter\(\([k]\) => k.includes\('gsap'\) || k.includes\('framer'\) || k.includes\('split'\)\).map\(\([k,v]\)=>k+': '+v\).join\('\\n'\)\)")
